# removeNotificationListener

**Instance Method**

Removes a function to call when a push notification occurs.

## Declaration

```swift
void removeNotificationListener(
	function listener
);
```

## Receiving Notifications

- **addNotificationListener**: Adds a function to call when a push notification occurs.
- **registerForNotifications**: Registers to receive push notifications.
- **unregisterForNotifications**: Unregisters to receive push notifications.
- **isRegisteredForNotifications**: Boolean value indicating whether this container is registered to receive push notifications.
